meaning: n.柄,把手,把柄,口实,手感vt.触摸,运用,买卖,处理,操作vi.搬运,易于操纵n.[计]句柄
examples: I pumped the handle like crazy.
The handle was just beyond my reach.
He whittled a new handle for his ax.
But I am concerned about how Obama will handle the crisis in the Middle East.
"Bees are reasonably well equipped to handle bad weather at the appropriate times, " says Norton Miller.
